definition: CREATE TRIGGER trg_update_group_member_count AFTER INSERT OR DELETE OR UPDATE ON public.group_members FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_group_member_count()
CREATE TRIGGER update_groups_timestamp BEFORE UPDATE ON public.groups FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION set_updated_at()
CREATE TRIGGER update_profiles_timestamp BEFORE UPDATE ON public.profiles FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION set_updated_at()
CREATE TRIGGER on_session_completed AFTER INSERT ON public.study_sessions FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION handle_session_completed()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_subject_weekly_goals_updated BEFORE UPDATE ON public.subject_weekly_goals FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION set_updated_at()
CREATE TRIGGER update_subjects_timestamp BEFORE UPDATE ON public.subjects FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION set_updated_at()
CREATE TRIGGER on_task_completed_xp AFTER UPDATE ON public.tasks FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION handle_task_completed_xp()
CREATE TRIGGER trg_tasks_updated BEFORE UPDATE ON public.tasks FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION set_updated_at()
